ddls:
CREATE TABLE "invocations" (
  "invocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invocation */,
  "caller_library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the caller library */,
  "caller_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the caller method */,
  "callee_library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the callee library */,
  "callee_field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the callee field */,
  "set_accessible_called_on" TEXT /* Type of object on which setAccessible was called (e.g., java.lang.reflect.Method, java.lang.reflect.Field) */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the accessed field (e.g., public, private, protected) */,
  "callee_name" TEXT /* Name of the callee method or field */,
  "field_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the accessed field */,
  "counts" INTEGER /* Count of invocations */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invocation occurred */,
  "invocation_type" TEXT /* Type of invocation (reflection-based or direct method invocation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invocations_caller_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("caller_method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invocations_caller_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("caller_library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invocations_callee_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("callee_library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invocations_callee_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("callee_field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries" (
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library */,
  "library_name" TEXT /* Name of the library */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library containing the method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "method_signature" TEXT /* Signature of the method */,
  "method_invocation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the method is invoked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_methods_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library containing the field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Type of the field */,
  "field_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the field (e.g., public, private, protected) */,
  "field_access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the field is accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "libraries_dependencies" (
  "library_dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each library dependency */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "dependent_library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dependent library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("library_dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_libraries_dependencies_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_libraries_dependencies_dependent_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "library_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the library */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the method */,
  "vulnerability_description" TEXT /* Description of the vulnerability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_vulnerabilities_library_id FOREIGN KEY ("library_id") REFERENCES libraries ("library_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_vulnerabilities_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invocation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "invocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the invocation */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the invocation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the invocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invocation_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invocation_logs_invocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("invocation_id") REFERENCES invocations ("invocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invocation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, security analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, security analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_retention_policy" (
  "retention_policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention policy */,
  "retention_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which data is retained */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the retention policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retention_policy_id")
)
